globalPromptPrefix: Use case: stylized-concept. Original premium fantasy RPG game art asset for Maweg Showroom V4. One asset only, consistent camera and target size, refined hand-painted surface treatment, controlled lighting, clean production separation, original IP.
commonNegativePrompt: text, letters, numbers, logo, watermark, graph, chart, data point, fake UI, button, price, coin, rarity label, rarity-color coding, flat recolor variant, excessive glow, over-saturated rank color, crop, overscan, letterbox, matte, padding, baked empty margin, V3 reuse, V3 tracing, V3 recolor, V3 remix, famous game character, recognizable franchise crest, proprietary weapon silhouette, signature, chroma-key fringe, clipped ornament, opaque safe area

graph_skin.label: 그래프 스킨
graph_skin.safeArea: S1: 중앙 가로 76% × 세로 70%에는 불투명 장식·강한 발광·고대비 무늬를 두지 않는다.
graph_skin.promptDirective: Output a single 1536×864 image, mathematically exact 16:9, edge-to-edge. No crop, no overscan, no padding, no letterbox, no matte, no baked empty margin. Keep the central 76% width × 70% height quiet and data-readable; place decorative silhouette and contrast only toward the perimeter. Do not draw a graph.

card_theme.label: 프로필 헤더 테두리
card_theme.safeArea: S2: 이모티콘+이름+칭호 헤더 바깥 테두리만 불투명. 내부 침범 0px, 내부 전체 알파 0.
card_theme.promptDirective: Output a 1536×384 wide transparent profile-header OUTER BORDER only. The silhouette may connect a circular emoji zone on the left to a two-line name/title safe zone on the right, but every pixel inside those content zones must remain alpha 0. No card background, no room, no landscape, no diorama, no filled nameplate, no translucent panel, no vignette. Decoration exists only outside the header content boundary.

point_marker.label: 포인트 마커
point_marker.safeArea: S3: 접점 중심 반경 18px 이내, 라벨 방향 12px 여백.
point_marker.promptDirective: Output one isolated 256×256 transparent PNG marker, front view, no cast shadow. Define one exact contact point; all visual mass stays within an 18 px radius around that point at final display scale, with 12 px clear space toward the label. Preserve a bold readable silhouette at 24–40 px. This marker is rendered only on the single minimum data point; never on maximum, current, or ordinary points.

companion.label: 동반자
companion.safeArea: S4: 우측 상단 14% × 22% 전용 둥지 안, 카드 폭 최대 11%.
companion.promptDirective: Output one isolated 512×512 transparent PNG companion in a compact three-quarter full-body pose, no floor and no cast shadow. Compose it for the chart card's upper-right nest only; the silhouette must remain readable at 44–68 px and effects must not escape the nest.

ambient_effect.label: 공간 효과
ambient_effect.safeArea: S5: 중앙 가로 72% × 세로 68%는 불투명 픽셀 0. 주변부 저대비만 허용.
ambient_effect.promptDirective: Output one 1536×864 transparent peripheral effect plate, exact 16:9. The central 72% width × 68% height must contain zero opaque pixels. Keep all forms low-contrast and behind the data, confined to edges and corners. No full-screen wash and no data-area flash.

trophy.label: 트로피
trophy.safeArea: S6: 좌측 상단 12% × 20% 선반 안, 카드 폭 최대 9%.
trophy.promptDirective: Output one isolated 512×512 transparent PNG trophy, front-biased three-quarter view, no floor and no cast shadow. Compose for a tiny upper-left shelf; preserve a strong readable silhouette at 24–40 px. This is an achievement-only reward, never a shop product.

profile_emoji.label: 프로필 이모티콘
profile_emoji.safeArea: S7: 얼굴 핵심부 중앙 64%, 프레임 없음, 48px 가독.
profile_emoji.promptDirective: Output one 512×512 transparent PNG shoulder-up three-quarter emotional portrait. Keep eyes, brows, mouth and core face inside the central 64%; no circular crop and no frame. The expression and species silhouette must read at 48 px.

emoji_border.label: 이모티콘 테두리
emoji_border.safeArea: S8: 중앙 구멍 지름 68% 이상, 장식은 바깥쪽으로만 확장.
emoji_border.promptDirective: Output one 768×768 transparent PNG portrait border. Keep a perfectly clear central opening at least 68% of canvas diameter; decoration extends outward only and never covers the face. No face, portrait, medallion fill or opaque center. Silhouette must read at 48 px.

line_style.label: 그래프 선
line_style.implementationTarget: Chart.js dataset options plus deterministic canvas plugin
line_style.markerPolicy: pointRadius 0 for every data point; apply the existing point_marker only to the single minimum point
line_style.userColorOverride: User-selected primary line color always wins; derive gradient, glow and lightning colors from the same OKLCH hue.
line_style.contrastPolicy: Warn below 3:1, strongly warn below 2:1, recommend same-hue lightness correction, never auto-apply.
line_style.reducedMotion: Freeze dashOffset, pulse, flow and lightning at the approved rest frame. Never move data coordinates.

uncommon.label: 고급
uncommon.directive: Use one clear dominant silhouette, one dominant material family with a restrained secondary join, 1–2 separable layers, and one quiet 2–3 second motion beat. Modest craft, not a flat icon.

rare.label: 희귀
rare.directive: Combine two materially distinct systems with one supporting motif or small sign of life, 2–3 separable layers, and two linked motion beats over 3–4 seconds.

epic.label: 영웅
epic.directive: Build a narrative object assembly with distinct foreground, middle and rear depth, 3–5 separable layers, and a readable start→climax→return event over 4–6 seconds.

legendary.label: 전설
legendary.directive: Build a symbolic large-scale silhouette with multiple materially distinct surfaces and spatial depth, 5–7 separable layers, and an appear→transform→climax→afterimage event over 6–9 seconds; avoid constant busy motion.

lineStyleRarityDirectives.uncommon: 1–2 canvas strokes, static or one restrained structural distinction; no glow-driven rank signal.
lineStyleRarityDirectives.rare: 2–3 rendering systems combining dash, gradient, underlay, pulse or flow in a controlled pair.
lineStyleRarityDirectives.epic: 3–5 rendering systems with foreground/rear separation and a start→climax→return motion event.
lineStyleRarityDirectives.legendary: 5–7 rendering systems with layered underlay, main stroke, gradient, event motion and afterimage; long rest between events.

lineColorContrastPolicy.gradientCheck: evaluate minimum contrast across every stop
lineColorContrastPolicy.recommendation: adjust lightness at the same hue; do not auto-apply
lineColorContrastPolicy.complexBackgroundFallback: recommend 1px low-chroma contrast underlay or glow alpha 0.18–0.30
